fullCourseName: MQTT and ESP32 IoT Lab Course @ Metropolia
shortDescription: Learn Python and MQTT on a real ESP32 board with two LEDs, JSON commands, and MQTT verification.
fullDescription: This course introduces students to basic IoT communication through practical ESP32 laboratory assignments. Students run short MicroPython snippets using the umqtt.simple MQTT client through the lab helper make_mqtt_client(), publish JSON telemetry, subscribe to MQTT command topics, parse JSON payloads, control LEDs on GPIO 2 and GPIO 4, and report the final device state. The course is structured so each lab can be verified through MQTT traffic from the real board.
requirements: Beginner-friendly. Basic familiarity with variables, functions, and loops is helpful.
